summary: Test suite has good TDD cycle organization and reasonable core unit tests (Cycles 1-10), but is fundamentally incomplete and cannot run. Critical issues: (1) test_workflow_* and run_tests.py reference test_fixtures/ and .github/workflows/pr-label-assigner.yml that are not provided in the submission—tests will immediately fail on test_workflow_file_exists(), test_workflow_references_script_files(), and act harness execution; (2) No tests for glob special characters (? and []), CLI output formats (json/csv), or main() function; (3) No tests for malformed JSON, invalid patterns, or Windows path edge cases mentioned in code; (4) Workflow structure tests skip if pyyaml missing, creating brittle pass-by-absence; (5) run_tests.py expects exact output markers from undefined workflow. Unit tests for core match_pattern and assign_labels are competent but miss pattern edge cases and have no integration coverage.
